title: Signs Your Digestive Enzymes Are Low After 40 (And What to Do)
seo_title: Signs of Low Digestive Enzymes After 40: What to Watch For
meta_description: Digestive enzyme production declines naturally with age, causing bloating, gas, and nutrient deficiencies. Learn the signs your enzymes are low and how to support digestion after 40.
tags: Gut Health, Digestive Enzymes, Bloating, Digestion, Supplements, Women Over 40
